policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: Reference Metric Disclosure Boundary, Assumptions, and Estimations GRI 305 – Emissions 2016 GRI 305-1 Direct (Scope 1) GHG emissions 160,150 mtCO2e Scope 1 GHG emissions were measured in accordance with the World Resources Institute (WRI)/World Business Council for Sustainable Development’s (WBCSD), The Greenhouse Gas Protocol: A Corporate Accounting and Reporting Standard (GHG Protocol). Cardinal Health selected an organizational boundary based on operational control and direct emissions sources include stationary and mobile combustion. Fuel sources included in Cardinal Health’s calculation of Scope 1 GHG emissions include natural gas, gasoline, diesel, jet fuel, liquified petroleum gas (LPG), and CH4 and N2O from biomass. Per the Greenhouse Gas Protocol Corporate Standard, direct CO2 from the combustion of biomass shall not be included in Scope 1 but reported separately. Cardinal Health’s direct CO2 emissions from the combustion of biomass is not included in the figures reported here in GRI 305-1, but is noted separately here as 24,540 mtCO2e. Emissions factors used: • 2023 Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Center for Corporate Climate Leadership GHG Emissions Factors Hub Please see our Basis of reporting for details on boundary, estimations, assumptions, and emissions factors. Please see our fiscal 2024 assurance statement. GRI 305-2 Indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions Location-based method: 205,710 mtCO2e Market-based metho

Please see our fiscal 2024 assurance statement. GRI 305-2 Indirect (Scope 2) GHG emissions Location-based method: 205,710 mtCO2e Market-based metho
records.original_snippet_en: Page 80 explicitly reports Scope 1 GHG emissions at 160150 mtCO2e under GRI 305 metrics; stored here as 0.16015 MtCO2e.
records.original_snippet_zh: 第 80 页在 GRI 305 指标表中明确披露 Scope 1 排放量为 160150 mtCO2e；本表按 0.16015 MtCO2e 存储。
